headline: CF Industries (CF) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Operationally, we had another strong quarter, running available ammonia capacity at nearly 100%, and our commercial, logistics, and distribution teams ensured we met customers’ requirements leading into the North American spring application season.  Damaged nitrogen and upstream feedstock capacity must be restored, and global trade flows will require time to recalibrate.  From a macro perspective, we believe recent geopolitical disruptions are driving a fundamental shift in our global industry’s risk-return framework.

headline: CF Industries: The Iran Premium Is A Double-Edged Sword (Downgrade)
summary: CF Industries is rated Buy, reflecting ongoing undervaluation despite recent gains driven by Middle East conflict disruptions. Read more on CF stock here.

headline: CF's Q1 Earnings and Sales Beat Estimates on Higher Prices
summary: CF rides on strong nitrogen demand and supply disruptions as Q1 sales jump 19% and adjusted earnings beat estimates.
